response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff-level engineer with strong domain knowledge in geospatial platforms and deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems. However, his systems programming experience is primarily in DLang rather than the required modern C++ or Rust, and his recent professional roles focus heavily on full-stack web development. While his architectural skills and GIS background are highly relevant, he would require some ramp-up time to adapt to a C++ or Rust-centric routing pipeline, making him a strong but non-traditional candidate.
strengths: Extensive geospatial data processing experience through founding GISCollective and working with Green Map.
Proven ability to design low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Broad technical expertise across the full stack, including DevOps, Linux servers, and systems programming.
concerns: Primary required languages (C++ or Rust) are missing from recent experience, with C++ usage dating back to 2015.
No explicit experience building navigation guidance or routing-specific data pipelines.
Recent professional roles lean heavily toward full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than backend data engineering.
